chainsmoker_cat.title: Chainsmoker Cat
chainsmoker_cat.synopsis: Yani, a catgirl with a severe smoking addiction, struggles to hold down a job, pay rent, and get her life together while her sister and friends try to help.

black_torch.title: Black Torch
black_torch.synopsis: Jiro Azuma, a teen who can see spirits, bonds with Rago, a mononoke cat, pulling him deeper into the hidden world of the mononoke.

sparks_of_tomorrow.title: Sparks of Tomorrow
sparks_of_tomorrow.jp_title: 20世紀電気目録 (20 Seiki Denki Mokuroku)
sparks_of_tomorrow.synopsis: In an alternate 20th-century Japan where electricity was never discovered, a boy and girl dream of finding the legendary Electrical Catalog.

goodbye_lara.title: Goodbye, Lara
goodbye_lara.synopsis: An original reinterpretation of Hans Christian Andersen's The Little Mermaid; Lara, a mermaid princess, is turned to sea foam and given a chance to be reborn and find true love.

marriagetoxin_dub.title: MARRIAGETOXIN (Dub)
marriagetoxin_dub.synopsis: Hikaru Gero, an assassin from the Poison Clan, is forced to find a bride and ends up entangled with Mei Kinosaki, a marriage-swindler. Season 1 finished its sub run June 30, 2026; Dub trails ~2 weeks behind. Season 2 confirmed for January 2027.
